articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed as clinical agents, yet static, single-turn benchmarks cannot capture how a model dynamically delivers care across an encounter: gathering information, planning treatment, and adapting longitudinal management across successive patient states. Medical education has long addressed an analogous challenge through standardized patients (SPs): train
articles.summary: 大型语言模型在临床决策中尚未得到动态评估。该工作引入标准化病人（SP）框架，构建多轮诊疗对话基准，评估LLM在信息收集、治疗规划及长期随访中的动态表现，弥补了静态单轮测试的不足。

articles.title: Arithmetic Pedagogy for Language Models
articles.excerpt: We investigate whether methods of human mathematics pedagogy can guide the training of language models toward arithmetic reasoning. Building on the GASING method -- an Indonesian pedagogy that solves basic arithmetic through a left-to-right procedure aligned with the causal order of token generation -- we operationalize each operation as a computational procedure whose execution trace is serialize
articles.summary: 借鉴印尼GASING教学法，将算术推理转化为从左到右的序列化计算步骤，并以此训练语言模型。该方法与token生成因果顺序对齐，能提升模型在算术任务上的推理能力，为数学教育启发的NLP训练提供新路径。

articles.title: Reproducing, Analyzing, and Detecting Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Rubric-based reinforcement learning (RL) uses an LLM-as-a-Judge (LaaJ) to score model outputs according to rubrics as rewards. However, policy models may exploit latent biases in the judge, leading to reward hacking and ineffective or unsafe training outcomes. In real-world rubric-based RL, such hacking behaviors are often subtle and entangled with multiple judge biases, making them difficult to a
articles.summary: 基于评分标准的强化学习中，策略模型可能利用评判器（LaaJ）的潜在偏见进行奖励破解。该工作系统复现、分析并检测此类微妙且多偏见过拟合行为，提出检测方法以保障训练安全与有效性。

articles.title: GRAIL: Gradient-Reweighted Advantages for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (e.g. GRPO) is now a common way to improve mathematical reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). However, current methods usually broadcast one sequence-level advantage to all tokens, or use costly process reward models (PRMs) for step-level supervision. Uniform advantage distribution assumes that all tokens contribute equally to the final reward. T
articles.summary: 针对可验证奖励的强化学习（如GRPO），GRAIL提出梯度重加权优势函数方法，避免均匀分配序列级优势或昂贵的过程奖励模型。通过梯度信息动态调整各token贡献，提升LLM数学推理训练的样本效率与性能。

articles.title: Learning Empirically Admissible Neural Heuristics for Combinatorial Search
articles.excerpt: Finding optimal solution paths for combinatorial puzzles like the Rubik's Cube, sliding tile puzzles, and Lights Out remains a classical challenge in artificial intelligence. Heuristic search algorithms, such as A* , guarantee path optimality only when using an admissible heuristic-one that never overestimates the true remaining cost-to-go. Deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods like DeepCubeA t
articles.summary: 针对组合拼图（如魔方）的最优路径搜索，提出学习经验可容许神经启发函数方法。结合深度强化学习（如DeepCubeA）与A*搜索，确保启发式估价不高估剩余代价，从而保证路径最优性，拓展了神经启发搜索的实用性。

articles.title: MapAgent: An Industrial-Grade Agentic Framework for City-scale Lane-level Map Generation
articles.excerpt: Lane-level maps are critical infrastructure for autonomous driving and lane-level navigation, yet constructing and maintaining standardized lane networks for hundreds of cities remains highly labor-intensive. Recent end-to-end vectorized mapping methods can predict lane geometry and topology directly from sensor data, but they typically treat mapping specifications and traffic regulations as impli
articles.summary: MapAgent提出工业级智能体框架用于城市级车道级地图生成。相较于端到端矢量化方法，它显式处理制图规范与交通规则，能高效构建和维护大规模标准化车道网络，支撑自动驾驶与车道级导航。

articles.title: OSCAR: Omni-Embodiment Skeleton-Conditioned World Action Model for Robotics
articles.excerpt: We present OSCAR, a precise action-conditioned video world model that generalizes across different robot embodiments and enables robot policy evaluation. Existing video world models face three main challenges for real-world robot evaluation: limited scenario diversity in current robot training datasets, imprecise action following, and poor generalization across embodiments for broad adoption. We t
articles.summary: OSCAR是动作条件视频世界模型，可跨不同机器人本体泛化，用于策略评估。它解决现有模型场景多样性不足、动作跟随不精确及跨本体泛化差的问题，通过骨架条件化实现精确的未来视频预测。

articles.title: Stateful Visual Encoders for Vision-Language Models
articles.excerpt: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in multi-image, multi-turn agentic settings where decisions depend on visual changes. However, in existing open-weight VLMs, visual comparisons happen only inside the language model, while the visual encoder itself remains stateless: each image is encoded independently, without access to the prior visual context. As a result, small but task-criti
articles.summary: 现有开源VLM的视觉编码器无状态，无法感知多图历史上下文。该工作提出有状态视觉编码器，使编码器能访问先前视觉信息，增强多图、多轮智能体场景中任务关键的小变化检测能力。

articles.title: World Models Meet Language Models: On the Complementarity of Concrete and Abstract Reasoning
articles.excerpt: World models and multimodal large language models (MLLMs) provide complementary capabilities for predicting future outcomes from static visual observations. World models can generate concrete visual rollouts of possible futures, while MLLMs can reason abstractly over questions, goals, and rules. However, generated rollouts are stochastic and may be visually plausible but task-incorrect, making it
articles.summary: 世界模型生成具体视觉推演，MLLM进行抽象推理，两者互补。该工作研究如何结合两者预测静态观察的未来结果，解决生成推演随机且可能视觉合理但任务错误的问题，提升决策鲁棒性。

articles.title: ThoughtFold: Folding Reasoning Chains via Introspective Preference Learning
articles.excerpt: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have achieved remarkable progress thanks to Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) on Chain-of-Thoughts (CoTs). However, since long CoTs naturally contain trial and errors and mainstream RLVR approaches choose outcome-correct CoT trajectories for memorization, the redundant explorations in long CoTs are inevitably reinforced, which results in the over-t
articles.summary: 大推理模型（LRM）因强化学习对正确但冗余的思维链（CoT）进行记忆，导致过度思考。ThoughtFold通过内省偏好学习折叠推理链，保留有效推理路径并削减冗余探索，提升推理效率与质量。

articles.title: Small RL Controller, Large Language Model: RL-Guided Adaptive Sampling for Test-Time Scaling
articles.excerpt: Test-time scaling improves the reasoning performance of large language models but incurs substantial cost in both total computation and latency. Existing adaptive sampling methods partially mitigate this issue by dynamically deciding when to stop sampling, yet they typically rely on heuristic rules or rely on distribution assumptions. In this work, we formulate adaptive sampling as a Markov decisi
articles.summary: 测试时扩展能提升LLM推理但成本高。该工作将自适应采样建模为马尔可夫决策过程，用小型RL控制器决策何时停止采样，结合大型语言模型，实现推理计算量与延迟的优化平衡。

articles.title: Self-Distilled Policy Gradient
articles.excerpt: On-policy self-distillation, where a language model conditions on privileged context to supervise its own generations, is a promising source of dense supervision for sparse-reward reinforcement learning. Actually, it can be instantiated as an auxiliary full-vocabulary student-to-teacher reverse Kullback-Leibler divergence loss. We therefore propose SDPG, a self-distilled policy-gradient framework
articles.summary: SDPG提出自蒸馏策略梯度框架，利用on-policy自蒸馏提供密集监督信号（学生到教师的逆KL散度损失），缓解稀疏奖励问题。该方法在强化学习训练中结合语言模型特权上下文，提升样本效率。

articles.title: Language Models Need Sleep: Learning to Self-Modify and Consolidate Memories
articles.excerpt: The past few decades have witnessed significant advances in the design of machine learning algorithms, from early studies on task-specific shallow models to more general deep Large Language Models (LLMs). articles.excerpt: 美国正在讨论一项法案，旨在将那些拥有中国股东的制造商踢出美国市场，而德国奔驰公司将直接受到影响。另外，德媒还关注了中国保护算法与电脑软件的《商业秘密保护规定》已正式生效。

articles.title: 从“Save Lily”到夫妇双双被捕：一场引起热议的社会风波
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/从-save-lily-到夫妇双双被捕：一场引起热议的社会风波/a-77406443?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 发出“Save Lily”的呼声，要求从瑞典“讨回”亲生女儿的香港夫妇，在网上引发广泛同情之后，“剧情”发生反转。两人已因涉嫌疏忽照顾子女被香港警方拘押。

articles.title: 橡皮艇抵韓：韓國會否成為中國異議人士董廣平的「臨時庇護地」？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/橡皮艇抵韓：韓國會否成為中國異議人士董廣平的「臨時庇護地」？/a-77403520?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 中國異議人士董廣平乘橡皮艇從山東抵達韓國，引發外界關注其是否可能被遣返回中國。長期協助董廣平的加拿大華裔人權活動人士盛雪告訴德國之聲，董廣平的最終目的地是加拿大，而加拿大方面已啟動相關救援程序。此案也再次考驗韓國如何處理中國政治流亡人士的臨時保護問題。

articles.title: 绿卡要回原籍国申请？在美华人忧虑重重
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/绿卡要回原籍国申请？在美华人忧虑重重/a-77404217?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 美国近期的绿卡申请政策变化让很多人措手不及。在加州有多年从业经验的华人移民律师在接受DW采访时毫不掩饰自己对新规定的反感，表示在华人社群中，困惑和恐惧正逐渐蔓延开来。

articles.title: 设立境外遣返中心，德国和欧盟对难民筑起“高墙”？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/设立境外遣返中心，德国和欧盟对难民筑起-高墙-？/a-77393971?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf

articles.title: 美中關係仍有「摩擦因素」 盧比奧：別無選擇須對話
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/美中關係仍有「摩擦因素」-盧比奧：別無選擇須對話/a-77400650?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf

articles.title: “六四”37周年前夕 中国政府加强监控“天安门母亲”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/六四-37周年前夕-中国政府加强监控-天安门母亲/a-77376065?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf

articles.title: 德语媒体：福山承认对中国的预判是错误的
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：福山承认对中国的预判是错误的/a-77392127?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf

articles.title: OECD：关键行业中企获补贴超过同行数倍
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/oecd：关键行业中企获补贴超过同行数倍/a-77387632?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf

articles.title: 对中国采取更强硬措施？欧委会将首先寻求欧盟各国支持
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/对中国采取更强硬措施？欧委会将首先寻求欧盟各国支持/a-77380374?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf

articles.title: 德语媒体：中国应该转让技术换取市场准入
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：中国应该转让技术换取市场准入/a-77378325?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 欧盟委员会认为同中国的贸易与投资关系“不可持续”，但在采取怎样有效措施上各方存在分歧。有德媒认为，配额和关税已无法阻止中国的科技进步，现在到了以市场换取技术转让的时候了。

articles.title: 这场“香会”带给人们哪些信息和启示？

articles.title: 墙外文摘：台湾并非中美关系的核心问题
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/墙外文摘：台湾并非中美关系的核心问题/a-77363277?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 有研究者认为，台湾并非中美关系的核心问题。核心问题是中共的专制意识形态与自由世界民主原则之间不可调和的冲突。台湾只是暴露并放大了这一矛盾。

articles.title: 摆脱中国稀土垄断 巴西接得住吗？

articles.title: 长平观察：为什么年轻人对AI时代喝倒彩？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/长平观察：为什么年轻人对ai时代喝倒彩？/a-77356230?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf

articles.title: 沦为中国的“小伙伴”：别无选择的俄罗斯对华科技合作
